hero.title: Track Your Games
hero.subtitle: The Ultimate Board Game Score Keeper
hero.description: Keep track of scores for all your favorite board games. Simple, elegant, and perfect for game nights with friends and family. Never lose track of who's winning again.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: Powerful features designed for board game enthusiasts

multiplayer.title: Multiplayer Support
multiplayer.description: Track up to 12 players simultaneously. Perfect for party games and family game nights.

scoreHistory.title: Score History
scoreHistory.description: View complete score history for each game. See how the game unfolded round by round.

customGames.title: Custom Games
customGames.description: Create custom games with your own scoring rules. Adapt the app to any board game.

quickSetup.title: Quick Setup
quickSetup.description: Start tracking in seconds. Select players, choose a game, and begin playing.

visualScoreboard.title: Visual Scoreboard
visualScoreboard.description: Beautiful, easy-to-read scoreboard that shows all players and their scores at a glance.

worksOffline.title: Works Offline
worksOffline.description: No internet required. Track scores anywhere, anytime. Your data is saved locally.

seeItInAction.title: See It in Action
seeItInAction.subtitle: Experience the simplicity and elegance of Skora: Tabletop

mainMenu.title: Main Menu
mainMenu.description: Navigate through your games and access all features from the intuitive main menu

game.title: Live Game View
game.description: Track scores in real-time with full-screen cards showing all 4 players and their current standings

details.title: Game Details
details.description: Review complete game history with detailed statistics and scores from your recent matches

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you
contact.supportDescription: Need help? Contact our support team
